about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: Engineering Tomorrow
about.description: Faisal Labs is a research-driven technology company specializing in cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and cloud infrastructure. Founded in 2021, we build intelligent defense systems that protect organizations against evolving digital threats.
about.mission: Our mission is to democratize enterprise-grade security through accessible, AI-powered solutions that adapt in real-time to emerging threats.

q1.question: What industries do you specialize in?
q1.answer: We work across fintech, healthcare, government, and critical infrastructure sectors. Our adaptive AI models are trained on diverse threat landscapes to provide industry-specific protection.

q2.question: How does your pricing model work?
q2.answer: We offer flexible subscription tiers based on infrastructure size and security requirements. Enterprise clients receive custom quotes with dedicated support SLAs.

q3.question: What is your incident response time?
q3.answer: Our AI-driven systems respond to known threats in under 10 milliseconds. For novel threats requiring human analysis, our team responds within 15 minutes, 24/7.

q4.question: Do you offer on-premises solutions?
q4.answer: Yes. We provide both cloud-native and air-gapped on-premises deployments for organizations with strict compliance requirements.

q5.question: How do you handle data privacy?
q5.answer: All data processing follows zero-knowledge architecture where possible. We are SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. Client data never leaves your environment unless explicitly authorized.
